resources.string: Automatically taps Skip Ad and Next buttons in YouTube.
Running — will skip ads in YouTube automatically.
Tap below to enable in Accessibility Settings.

How it works: this app uses Android\'s Accessibility API to watch YouTube\'s screen content and tap the Skip Ad or Next button the moment it appears — regardless of where the button is on screen or how long the ad has been playing.\n\nNo data is collected or transmitted.
